steps.title: Find the key similarity signal
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity. The strongest clue in the notes is when both books entered the public domain in consecutive years (2019 and 2021). Any correct choice must focus on this shared status, not their genres (poems vs. novels) or timing contrasts.

steps.title: Match the shared public domain status
steps.content: Choice B directly links both books to the shared action of recently entered the public domain, capturing the student's goal. A, C, and D either highlight differences (A and C) or focus on one book's status (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
